indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to perform cooking activities.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: absence of storage space
indicators.rationale: No cabinets or shelves are visible, which are essential for storing ingredients and kitchen tools.

indicators.name: absence of lighting control
indicators.rationale: No switches or controls for adjusting the lighting are visible, making it difficult to create a suitable cooking environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, no hard prep surfaces, no storage space, and no lighting control, making it impossible to perform any cooking tasks.
